ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission – Due Friday, 25 April
ham.body:
Dear students,

I hope you are all doing well. This is a friendly reminder that the semester project submissions are due on Friday, April 25th at 11:59 PM.

Please ensure that you have uploaded your final report and any supporting materials to the course portal by the deadline. Late submissions will be penalized as per the course policy.

If you have any questions or need clarification on the submission format, feel free to reply to this email or visit the course wiki.

Best regards,
Professor Jane Doe
Department of Computer Science

spam.subject: Urgent: Action Required – IT Ticket #987654 – Password Reset
spam.body:
Hello,

Our security system has identified unusual login activity on your account and has automatically opened IT Ticket #987654.

To prevent potential compromise, we require you to reset your password immediately. Please click <URL> to proceed with the reset process.

Note: If you do not reset your password within 24 hours, your account will be temporarily locked for security reasons.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best,
IT Support Team
